title: A Message with Strings and Number values

content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to create a Python program that displays a message containing both text and a number using the `print()` function.

Your program should output the following format:

`The price of the product is 99 dollars.
`Make sure to combine the text and number in a single call to the `print()` function to achieve the desired output.
content.outputFormat: The price of the product is 99 dollars.

sampleTestCases.output: The price of the product is 99 dollars.
sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the fixed sentence because there is no input to process.

hidden.label: minimum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: The price of the product is 99 dollars.

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: The price of the product is 99 dollars.

hidden.label: edge case
hidden.expectedOutput: The price of the product is 99 dollars.

hidden.label: general case 1
hidden.expectedOutput: The price of the product is 99 dollars.

hidden.label: general case 2
hidden.expectedOutput: The price of the product is 99 dollars.

solution.approach: Since there is no input, the program simply prints the required sentence. The number 99 is embedded directly in the string. The solution runs in O(1) time and O(1) memory.

code.Python3:
# No input required.
T = 1
for _ in range(T):
    print("The price of the product is 99 dollars.")
